description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a mesh upper in shades of gray and white, designed for breathability and flexibility. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap and a structured heel counter for added support and durability. The midsole appears to be made of lightweight foam, providing cushioning and shock absorption, while the outsole is constructed from rubber for traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat laces, and the shoe includes a padded collar and tongue for comfort. Subtle geometric patterns and overlays add visual interest and structural integrity to the sides. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A gray and white athletic running shoe with mesh upper, foam midsole, and rubber outsole, featuring a standard criss-cross lacing system and padded collar.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mesh toe box, laces, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the geometric overlays, mesh upper, and foam midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the structured heel counter and padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the mesh pattern, side overlays, and sole profile.
